academy.name: Scaler Academy
academy.duration: 12 months (30-week advanced, 37-week intermediate, longer for beginners)
academy.target: Software engineers with 6+ months experience, 0-7 YoE
academy.ai_integration: AI woven into every module, lab, assignment, and DSA problem. 24x7 AI Companion that hints, critiques approach, and pair-programs alongside you.
key_differentiators: Live classes with industry instructors (not pre-recorded)
Curriculum updates forever at no extra cost
Projects tied to real business cases, module by module
In-house coding platform, terminal-based judges, AI mock interviews
academy.curriculum_update_policy: Updated to reflect real-time industry shifts at no extra cost. Living curriculum, not a 2026 snapshot.

ai_ml.name: Scaler Advanced AI & Machine Learning
ai_ml.tagline: Neural networks, agentic systems, and production-deployed LLMs for AI-first builders
ai_ml.target: Engineers who want applied AI/ML depth, not just theory
ai_ml.key_differentiator: AI built into every module, not bolted on after. Covers the applied side, not just papers.

data_science.name: Scaler Data Science & ML
data_science.target: Professionals looking to transition into data science/ML roles

devops.name: Scaler DevOps & Cloud
devops.target: Engineers looking to specialize in DevOps and cloud infrastructure

placement_outcomes.source: Audited Career Transition Assessment Report by B2K Analytics (same agency that audits IIM Ahmedabad placements)
placement_outcomes.typical_service_to_product_jump: From 6-14 LPA service company roles to 20-30+ LPA product company roles
placement_support_includes: Support continues up to 12 months post-graduation

financing.no_cost_emi: Available up to 12 months through NBFC partners
financing.down_payment_example: As low as 35,000 INR down payment
financing.monthly_emi_with_scholarship: As low as ~9,811/month with scholarship + EMI
financing.scholarship: Up to 25,000 INR based on entrance test performance
financing.refund_policy: 14-day refund window from first class (full refund minus deposit in some cases)
financing.pause_option: Up to 3 months course pause available

instructors.background: Engineers from Facebook, Hotstar, Snapdeal, Media.net, Google, Microsoft and other top product companies
instructors.key_point: Instructors have overseen scaling of production systems first-hand
instructors.format: Live sessions, not just pre-recorded. Teaching assistants available for doubt resolution.

entrance_test.purpose: Placement into correct batch (Beginner/Intermediate/Advanced) + scholarship eligibility
entrance_test.difficulty: Designed to assess current level, not filter out. Beginners can clear it.
entrance_test.scholarship_link: Performance on test determines scholarship amount (up to 25K)

scaler_differentiators: Live classes with real-time doubt resolution vs pre-recorded
1:1 mentorship from industry engineers vs self-study
Placement support + hiring network vs no career services
Structured accountability (cohort, deadlines, TAs) vs 4% completion rate on MOOCs
Projects graded by mentors vs auto-graded quizzes
Peer cohort for networking vs isolated learning
Curriculum updates forever vs static course content

service_to_product.pattern: Engineers from TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Cognizant moving to Amazon, Microsoft, Google, Flipkart

tier3_to_product.pattern: Graduates from tier-2/3 colleges landing product company roles
tier3_to_product.example: Learner from tier-3 college in QA transitioned to product company role
tier3_to_product.key_factor: Strong projects + mock interview prep + referral network

important_caveats.no_job_guarantee: Scaler provides placement assistance, not a guaranteed job. Outcomes depend on effort, market conditions, and role availability.
important_caveats.time_commitment: 8-10 hours per week minimum. Program is intensive.
important_caveats.eligibility_for_support: Placement support requires completing mandatory modules and projects.
important_caveats.not_for_everyone: If you cannot commit consistent time, wait until you can.
